Task: Debug an issue

Code:
with mlflow.start_run(run_name="best_model"):
    y_pred = best_model.predict(X_test)

    score_rmse = root_mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred)
    print(f"RMSE: {score_rmse:.4f}")

    mlflow.log_metric("rmse", score_rmse)
    mlflow.log_params(best_params)

    mlflow.sklearn.log_model(
        sk_model=best_model,
        artifact_path="best_lgbm"
    )

Expected behavior:
mlflow working properly -> best model saves in mlflow

mlflow crushing, no best model

- trying to save best model to mlflow
